_comment: AUDIT TEST CASE: ENCL only, No REF - Measure Subj → ENCL and ENCL → Body spacing
subj: ENCL ONLY COLLAPSE SPACING AUDIT TEST CASE
body: 1. First paragraph for spacing audit. This line verifies baseline-to-baseline measurement between ENCL block and first body paragraph when REF is not present.
2. Second paragraph for spacing audit. This paragraph confirms consistent paragraph-to-paragraph spacing.
3. Third paragraph for spacing audit. Final paragraph before signature block.
